specs.title: cp-001: CmdL Toggle Lock on selected block
cp-004: Delete Backspace Delete selected blocks respects lock
cp-006: CmdC Copy block if block selected or copy slide if no block selected
cp-008: CmdV Paste block if blocks in clipboard or paste slide
cp-009: Home Jump to first slide
cp-010: End Jump to last slide
cp-013: Shortcuts disabled when typing in INPUT TEXTAREA or contentEditable elements
cp-014: UndoRedo disabled when editing a block
cp-015: Z-order shortcuts only work when block is selected not select all
cp-016: Solid Color Single color from ColorPicker
cp-017: Gradient Linear gradient with configurable angle and color stops
cp-018: Image Background image with URL
cp-029: Overlay style correctly renders in both editor and presenter
cp-030: Each slide can override the theme background
cp-031: Reset to Theme Default removes the override
cp-032: Background changes reflect in filmstrip thumbnails
